## Check type ID

`kind: object_field_enum`

## Purpose

Require that a field is one of a fixed set of values.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `field` | yes | — | Frontmatter key to check. |
| `values` | yes | — | Allowed values. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: object_field_enum
        field: status
        values: [draft, published, archived]
```
